# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Deployment / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Frontend type-check passes
- [ ] Frontend lint passes
- [ ] Frontend build passes
- [ ] Backend Ruff check passes
- [ ] Backend tests pass
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] README/docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Public demo wording remains honest about `demo-local` provider mode

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes.

## Notes for Reviewers

Mention any important implementation details, limitations, or follow-up work.
